name: folder-base-view
description: Open a folder in the file explorer to view its contents as a Bases-powered table of contents, with no companion note required.

scripts.version: node scripts/check-changelog.mjs && npm run build && node version-bump.mjs && git add manifest.json versions.json
scripts.postversion: git push origin main --follow-tags && node scripts/extract-release-notes.mjs && gh release create $npm_package_version main.js manifest.json --notes-file .release-notes.md

author: KulySocc
